surfaces.inputs: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#D97706] focus:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-white

image_urls.description: Cinematic dark blue fabric texture. Use as a full-screen background for the Welcome and Paywall screens with an overlay of bg-black/40 to ensure text readability.
Rich dark textured backdrop for the paywall screen, provides a premium VIP feel.

Welcome.layout: Full-screen background image (cover), bottom-aligned glassmorphism container
elements: Primary CTA: 'Enter the Vault' (Navigates to Auth)
Welcome.styling: Container needs generous top padding inside the bottom sheet (pt-10 pb-12 px-6). Use p-8 overall. Primary CTA must use solid #D97706 with black text for contrast.

Auth.layout: Safe area top, back button, left-aligned typography.
Auth.styling: Inputs must be massive for touch targets (min-h-[56px] or h-14). Labels floating or clearly above. Use rounded-2xl.

elements: Subtitle: 'Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.'
OTP.styling: OTP squares must be text-2xl font-bold, h-14 w-12 rounded-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-center. Focus adds gold border. Layout must be flex-row justify-between.

elements: Background: dark texture image with heavy vignette (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/80 to-transparent).
Feature List: 'Unlimited Streaming', 'Ad-free Experience', 'Premium 4K Support'. Use Lucide Icons.
Bottom Sticky Container: Glassmorphism with massive 'Subscribe' button (opens Stripe Link).
Paywall.styling: The pricing card must have a glowing border effect ('Tracing Beam' look) using rgba(217,119,6,0.3). Sticky CTA container should use backdrop-blur-2xl with pb-safe to avoid bottom notches.

elements: Animated SVG or Spinner (Subtle gold glow).
Top Header: H-14, solid #0F1016 or glassmorphism, with 'Captn Hack' centered and a Settings gear icon on the right.

Settings.styling: List items must be h-16, flex-row, items-center, border-b border-white/5. Destructive action uses #EF4444.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is an Expo React Native hybrid app, apply Tailwind classes using NativeWind or your framework's equivalent.
Do NOT use HTML elements like <form> or <select> if building in pure React Native. Map these Tailwind classes to <View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, and <TouchableOpacity>.
Ensure the hero background images are set with a dark overlay to maintain WCAG AA contrast for text.
Use Lucide-react-native or Phosphor Icons for all icons.
For the paywall, implement a glowing or premium border on the active plan using standard CSS or React Native Reanimated.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing (e.g. data-testid='auth-continue-button').
All touch targets must be at least 48px, ideally 56px (h-14) as specified in the spacing rules.
Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for Body font.
